'''Parody squad''' was stationed at the [[Rebel outpost (Taul)|Rebel outpost]] on [[Taul/Legends|Taul]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]], and consisted of nine elite [[Soldier/Legends|soldiers]] armed with [[Blaster pistol/Legends|blaster pistols]] and [[Vibroblade/Legends|vibroblades]]. During the [[Battle of Taul]], Parody squad was under the command of quixotic [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] [[Warl Thimbus]].
